classificationRules.MERGE_APPROVED_CANDIDATE: Same normalized/similar name, same current Program, same gender, and no conflicting birthDate. Still requires manual identity verification before execution.
classificationRules.NEEDS_MANUAL_CONFIRMATION: Same/similar name but different Program or incomplete evidence that needs source review.
classificationRules.KEEP_SEPARATE: Conflicting birthDate, gender, or strong evidence of different players. Do not merge.

summary.recommendedNextRepairPrompt: Review scripts/reports/all-player-merge-plan.json, manually verify identities for MERGE_APPROVED_CANDIDATE groups, then approve a transaction-safe player merge script for selected groups only. Do not merge NEEDS_MANUAL_CONFIRMATION or KEEP_SEPARATE groups without source evidence.
